title: Ez Elytra Boost
description: Launch and boost your Elytra with a single right-click! No more double-jumping or space-bar spam.
body:
-One-Click Launch: Just right-click with a firework rocket while standing on the ground to instantly launch into the air.

Smooth Boosting: Use rockets in mid-air with a single click. No awkward timing needed.

Anti-Glitch Speed: Optimized flight physics to prevent "speed-flickering" (the Flash effect) when using multiple rockets.

Instant Landing: No more sliding on the grass for miles. When you touch the ground, you stop safely.

- Why use Ez Elytra Boost?
 
Vanilla Minecraft requires you to jump and then time your rocket perfectly. Ez Elytra Boost makes the process seamless. Whether you are a pro or a beginner, this mod makes Elytra flight feel like it should have been from the start!

-Credits:

Created by ItsRaphaelakosYT.
